sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n20647" key="bou/palis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βούπᾰλις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">πάλη</etym>) <sense id="n20647.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">wrestling like a bull</tr_>, i.e. <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">hard-struggling</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἀεθλοσύνη</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">APl.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.67</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
